name: Polda 5
short_description: Elite private detective Pankrac saves the world as an agent of the Time Police. Help him settle all the time anomalies in the history of mankind.
detailed_description:
The story of this classic point & click adventure game revolves around time travel. A mysterious package appears at the door of our hero, a private detective, with the sender's address missing. A new crazy case can begin. We need to get to the bottom of the mystery and, if there is time, perhaps save humanity, or at least a few beauties. In the game you will visit several time periods. Together we'll take a look at ancient Egypt, ancient Troy, or the German base where the latest aviation technology is being developed.

  • 36 interactive characters
  • 45 game locations in different settings
  • outstanding and stylish graphic design
  • lots of game items
  • interesting detective plot
  • logical puzzle tasks
  • quality music and sound effects
